opinion.h1: HUNSAKER v. TOLTEC RANCH CO, 195 U.S. 640 (1904)
opinion.h2: ISAAC HUNSAKER, SR., et al., Plaintiffs in Error, v. TOLTEC RANCH COMPANY. No. 295.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Wm. T. S. Curtis for defendant in error.
Docketed and dismissed on motion of Mr. Wm. T. S. Curtis for defendant in error.
